creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Menelkir from comment #4)

Yes Daniel, I know it is a new port. That is the point. New ports *need to be properly hooked up to the tree structure*. Your patch adds a new directory under sysutils/ but it *does NOT* add that entry to sysutils/Makefile.

Hint: grep for g15 in sysutils/Makefile.
